specific_question: During September 2025, how many IT requests were submitted to install colored LED lights on keyboards to match store branding in the Southwest region?
answer: Internal analytics show that 230 requests across four Southwestern stores were documented during the month of September.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Lee’s Market expand and optimize its IT self-service capabilities to reduce service desk dependency, accelerate resolution times, and improve both employee and customer experience across all stores?
